prior_findings_reverification.prior_description: agents/test-writer.md:196-199 redundant 4-line preamble restating per-task vs global manifest split
prior_findings_reverification.evidence: Preamble now reads: 'Write to `docs/dev/test-writer-report-<task_id>.json` (or return as stdout if the orchestrator captures inline). The `manifest_path` field is the PER-TASK active manifest path (see Procedure step 5 for global-index handling):' — single back-reference to Procedure step 5 instead of restating shape annotations.

Line 1000 retains a single bounded parenthetical that is load-bearing (disambiguating two same-named files — required for QA-side discrimination semantics). Step 5 (line 1004) preserves the verbatim sentinel-token contract 'tests/generated/manifest.json is missing' which close.md depends on. Schema _doc (line 1434) is a JSON inline comment whose function is precisely to carry the disambiguation rule. Content is functional rules, not story; trimmed to single bounded parentheticals.
